provenance: ping -c 100 -i 0.01 127.0.0.1 (grep icmp_seq lines) — real ICMP echo replies. Each reply recurs with identical content {bytes=64, from=127.0.0.1, ttl=64} and a real per-reply latency; only the monotone icmp_seq counter (and time) vary. icmp_seq is the canonical VaryingIdentity field that forces unique whole-item hashes.
